title: Agent Handoffs and Routing
description: One agent hands off control to another agent; handoff prompts are generated and validated
actors: LLM (decides which handoff tool to call at runtime)
SourceAgent (currently active agent that triggers handoff)
use_cases: Create Handoff — developer calls handoff(agent, ...) to wrap target Agent into a Handoff object
Register Handoff on Agent — developer assigns Handoff objects to Agent.handoffs list (plain Agent or Handoff)
Resolve Enabled Handoffs — AgentRunner calls get_handoffs(agent, context_wrapper) which filters by is_enabled
Expose Handoff as Tool — AgentRunner exposes each enabled Handoff as an LLM tool named transfer_to_<agent_name>
LLM Invokes Handoff Tool — LLM selects and calls a handoff tool (e.g. transfer_to_refund_agent) with optional JSON args
Validate Handoff Input — on_invoke_handoff() validates tool-call JSON args against input_json_schema via TypeAdapter
Execute on_handoff Callback — _invoke_handoff() calls user-supplied on_handoff(ctx) or on_handoff(ctx, input_data)
Execute Handoffs Step — AgentRunner calls execute_handoffs() which invokes on_invoke_handoff and gets new_agent
Apply Input Filter — HandoffInputFilter function transforms HandoffInputData before next agent receives history
Apply Nest Handoff History — nest_handoff_history() collapses prior transcript into <CONVERSATION HISTORY> summary block
Remove All Tools from History — handoff_filters.remove_all_tools(HandoffInputData) strips tool-call items from history
Inject Handoff Prompt Prefix — developer calls prompt_with_handoff_instructions(prompt) or uses RECOMMENDED_PROMPT_PREFIX
Emit Handoff Hooks — execute_handoffs() calls hooks.on_handoff(ctx, from_agent, to_agent) and agent.hooks.on_handoff()
Switch Active Agent — run loop sets current_agent = NextStepHandoff.new_agent and continues iteration
Override Tool Name/Description — developer provides tool_name_override / tool_description_override to handoff()
Dynamically Enable/Disable Handoff — is_enabled callable checked per-turn via check_handoff_enabled()
Configure Conversation History Wrappers — set_conversation_history_wrappers(start, end) / reset_conversation_history_wrappers()
Override Nest History Per-Handoff — handoff(nest_handoff_history=True/False) overrides RunConfig-level flag

key_fields: input_items: tuple[RunItem, ...] | None  # overrides new_items for next agent input

handoff().signature: handoff(agent, tool_name_override=None, tool_description_override=None, on_handoff=None, input_type=None, input_filter=None, nest_handoff_history=None, is_enabled=True) -> Handoff
handoff().behavior: Builds Handoff object; validates on_handoff signature; creates _invoke_handoff async closure that validates JSON input, calls on_handoff, returns agent

get_handoffs().behavior: Iterates agent.handoffs; auto-wraps plain Agent via handoff(); filters by is_enabled check

execute_handoffs().signature: async execute_handoffs(*, public_agent, original_input, pre_step_items, new_step_items, new_response, run_handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, ...) -> SingleStepResult
execute_handoffs().behavior: Takes first handoff (ignores duplicates); opens handoff_span; calls on_invoke_handoff(); appends HandoffOutputItem; fires hooks.on_handoff + agent.hooks.on_handoff; resolves input_filter (per-handoff takes precedence over RunConfig); applies nest_handoff_history if enabled

nest_handoff_history().behavior: Normalizes + flattens nested history; passes transcript through mapper (default: default_handoff_history_mapper); returns clone with collapsed input_history and filtered input_items

default_handoff_history_mapper().behavior: Summarizes entire transcript as single assistant message wrapped in <CONVERSATION HISTORY>...</CONVERSATION HISTORY>

remove_all_tools().behavior: Removes all HandoffCallItem, HandoffOutputItem, ToolCallItem, ToolCallOutputItem, ToolSearchCallItem, ReasoningItem, MCP items, ToolApprovalItem from history and new_items

prompt_with_handoff_instructions().behavior: Prepends RECOMMENDED_PROMPT_PREFIX to agent instructions so LLM understands handoff mechanics

run_loop_integration: AgentRunner calls get_handoffs(agent, ctx) each turn to collect enabled Handoff list
Enabled handoffs exposed as tools to LLM alongside regular tools
LLM returns tool_call for a transfer_to_X tool → detected as ToolRunHandoff in ProcessedResponse
execute_handoffs() called → invokes on_invoke_handoff → returns new_agent
Input filter / nest_history applied to produce new HandoffInputData for next agent
run_loop sets current_agent = NextStepHandoff.new_agent and continues loop
Multiple simultaneous handoffs: only first is executed, rest get 'Multiple handoffs detected' output message
Guardrails: input guardrails apply only to first agent; output guardrails only to agent producing final output
relationships: Agent has_many Handoff (via Agent.handoffs: list[Agent | Handoff])
Handoff wraps Agent (weak ref _agent_ref; on_invoke_handoff closure captures agent)
execute_handoffs creates HandoffInputData and applies filter/nesting
HandoffPrompt (RECOMMENDED_PROMPT_PREFIX) injected into Agent.instructions by developer
RunConfig.handoff_input_filter is fallback when Handoff.input_filter is None
RunConfig.nest_handoff_history is fallback when Handoff.nest_handoff_history is None
business_rules: Handoff stays within a single Runner.run() call — not cross-run
Only first handoff is honored when LLM requests multiple simultaneously
Disabled handoffs (is_enabled=False) are hidden from LLM tool list at runtime
Per-handoff input_filter takes precedence over RunConfig.handoff_input_filter
Per-handoff nest_handoff_history takes precedence over RunConfig.nest_handoff_history
Server-managed conversations (conversation_id / previous_response_id) disallow input_filter and nest_handoff_history
input_type / on_handoff must both be provided or neither
input_json_schema is always enforced in strict mode (ensure_strict_json_schema)
Nest handoff history is opt-in beta (disabled by default)
input_items field on HandoffInputData: when set, used for next agent input instead of new_items (preserves session history)
